name: EVkids Reminder Agent
description: Scans for opportunities whose deadlines fall within configured reminder windows (default: 7 days and 2 days before) and sends a short nudge to every student who received a draft for that opportunity. Uses a ReminderLog to guarantee exactly-once delivery per student per opportunity per window — idempotent across any number of scheduled runs. No LLM involved; messages use a fixed template.

extensions.evkids:recipient_filter: students who received a draft for the expiring opportunity

card_data.name: EVkids Reminder Agent
card_data.description: Sends deadline-reminder nudges to students whose opportunities are approaching the configured reminder windows (7 days, 2 days). Idempotent per student+opportunity+window via ReminderLog. No LLM — fixed template. Runs directly without human approval.

skills.name: Run Reminder Pass
skills.description: Queries for all opportunities with a deadline within the configured reminder windows, finds students who received a draft for each, checks the ReminderLog for already-sent reminders, and sends any outstanding nudges via the student's preferred channel. Returns the count of reminders sent.

inputSchema.description: No input required — agent reads deadline windows and student data from repository

reminders_sent.description: Total number of reminders dispatched in this run

examples: Hourly reminder sweep — check for deadlines in next 7 or 2 days
Run after adding a batch of new opportunities to catch any immediate deadlines
